title: Hiring Medical Officer at Breach Candy Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Breach Candy Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Breach Candy Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Breach Candy Hospital:
Breach Candy Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital!
